bi_rate_note: BI held at 5.75% in March 2026. Market expects 25-50bps cuts in Q2-Q3 2026.
idr_note: IDR under pressure from Fed policy divergence and EM capital outflows.
foreign_flow_note: Broad EM de-risking driven by Fed hawkishness, not IDX-specific. Q1 2026 saw $2.1B net foreign outflows from IDX.
key_events: BI rate decision April 15 — market expects hold
